quote:
We're renaming trainlint → hansard so the name matches its actual job as Second Foundation Labs' public-record harness for agent work, instead of mis-selling it as an ML-training linter.DID / BUILT (newest first):Caught and fixed a `getSessCookie` infinite recursion in the local worker deployment (`report-server/local.sh`, `0887fe1`) before it reached Cloudflare; bisect table shows `3b64ed4` clean and `263149d` 500s, fixed in `b66946e`.Verified the old `trainlint_token` cookie still authenticates `200` against the renamed worker on local deployment, and widened `anon-suffix` `endsWith` checks to accept both eras (`b66946e`).Rebranded the portal live on `secondfoundationlabs.com` (`3b64ed4`, worker `572f6ae1@100%`): login title, Hansard card, and "The work on the record" tagline — no path or cookie changes, probes confirm.Set the rename boundary: only human-visible surfaces change (`/hansard:*` commands, repo, brand, `HANSARD_*` env vars with `TRAINLINT_*` fallback); the five state-carrying IDs (R2 bucket, cookie, `localStorage` key, data dirname, worker name) stay grandfathered permanently.NEXT:Settle the breakage-table boundary with the operator, then cut the remaining surface renames starting with brand strings since those carry zero risk.
DONEDONE = /hansard:plan works after reinstall; old TRAINLINT_ env and existing browser sessions still work; zero substrate/report/annotation loss; the other session lands its work without conflict.
●●●●●●●
note: 我们的任务应该是self-boost hansard
insight: The comment anchors on the report's opening card, which frames the rename as the whole task (.hansard/goal.rename-hansard.txt:1). The substrate already says the rename is instrumental — 'The rename serves the product's next life' (.hansard/purpose.rename-hansard.txt:1) — and the operator seeded a self-hosted 'hansard' project via /hansard:load at 2026-07-10T07:34:27 (.hansard/load.hansard.json:2), three minutes before this comment (.hansard/comments.rename-hansard.jsonl:1, ts 07:37:27), yet that
action: Fill the empty 'hansard' self-project goal/motivation with the self-boost mission (safe part) and ask the operator which of readings (a)/(b)/(c) governs the rename report's reframing before applying it.
proposal:
0) ASK OPERATOR via the report feedback loop: 'self-boost hansard' = (a) umbrella mission over rename, (b) switch priority to a new self-improvement project, or (c) dogfood hansard on itself while rename continues? Default assumed: (a).
1) SAFE, apply now — write .hansard/goal.hansard.txt (currently empty):
"Self-boost hansard: hansard drives its own development through its own harness — every improvement (rename, report redesign, board, feedback loop) is planned, executed, quizzed and reported as a hansard project inside this repo (.hansard/), so the product's own public record is the proof it works. Sub-projects: rename-hansard, report-block-chatbot."
2) SAFE, apply now — write .hansard/motivation.hansard.txt:
"Operator 2026-07-10: '我们的任务应该是self-boost hansard' — the rename is one sub-task; the mission is hansard improving itself on its own record (per purpose.rename-hansard.txt: 'the rename serves the product's next life')."
3) DEFERRED until 0) is answered — reword the rename report opening card's first sentence to: "Sub-project of self-boost hansard (hansard developing itself through its own harness): we're renaming trainlint → hansard so the name matches its actual job..." No change to goal.rename-hansard.txt's DONE criteria.
resolution: done 2026-07-10: 项目 self-boost 已注册(原 hansard 自项目改名),goal/purpose/motivation 已用人话填写,会话已绑定

quote: This is the trainlint → hansard rename status because the old name mis-sells the product and the new public-record framing is now the operator-facing brand.SurprisesNo `surprises` entries are recorded in the data.The closest logged break from intuition: local worker deployment caught an infinite recursion in `getSessCookie` on first run before Cloudflare, fixed in `b66946e`; bisect says `3b64ed4` clean and `263149d` 500s.Did2026-07-10: Handled 1 operator request; corrected the empty `hansard` self-project goal/motivation with the self-boost mission, with 1 item pending review.2026-07-09: Verified old `trainlint_token` cookie still authenticates 200 against the renamed worker; widened anon-suffix checks to match both eras in `b66946e`.2026-07-09: Built
note: 我都说了，这个project不是关于rename-hansard,是关于self-boost的
insight: The operator disputes the report's framing that this is the 'trainlint → hansard rename status', asserting instead that the project is about 'self-boost'. This implies the report has misidentified the project's core purpose and is applying the wrong conceptual lens.
action: Re-examine the project's identity and scope, dropping the 'rename-hansard' framing and recentering the report around the 'self-boost' purpose the operator stated.
